_commentScope: Scoped to pure-logic modules. The IPC handlers (main.ts) + secrets.ts depend on the live Electron runtime — mocking them just to mutate would be high-noise, low-signal.
_thresholdsRationale: Re-baselined for new-scope introduction. break=94 (set at 94.76 after stocks.ts joined mutate scope — adds ~570 mutants, initial coverage 84.59% with equivalent-mutant pragmas applied; the 10 other files remain at 100% covered). The non-decreasing ratchet rule applies WITHIN A FIXED SCOPE — adding a new file is a legitimate re-baseline event (cf. KPI introduction 89.35 → 90.33). Follow-up: drive stocks.ts → 100% kill and ratchet back to 99.
